❤️ 🍫 ABOUT VALERIE! ❤️ 🍫

Valerie Valentoon Valentino is the main character for Valentine's day! She 1st debuted in the unaired Valentine's Special, back in 1999. Valerie is a nice and friendly gal who loves to spread joy and happiness to the other toons, but most importantly: the gift of Love! She loves everytoon so much, and will do anything for them.. but, Valerie never has time to love herself. And since she's the only holiday toon that's themed around a less unimportant holiday, she can feel lonely and sometimes antisocial. She loves to help others, but never herself.
creator: BrokenNight
